description.p: Koplyx keeps a local encrypted history of text, image and file clipboard entries so users can quickly recover previous copies.
It provides decrypted in-app previews, search, pinned text, quick restore, optional X11 auto-paste, and a system tray indicator.
This app currently targets Linux desktop environments with X11 support. Wayland behavior can vary by compositor.
Add decrypted in-app previews for text, image thumbnails, and copied file names without storing sensitive previews in SQLite.
Start in the background by default and keep running from the system tray when the window is closed.
Reduce plaintext clipboard metadata and harden local file permissions.
Add Snapcraft and Flatpak packaging metadata.
Public release hardening with Secret Service key storage and HTML documentation.
